entity.label: Mount Sion
entity.subtitle: Mountain
entity.description: Denotes Mount Hermon in Deut. 4:48; called Sirion by the Sidonians, and by the Amorites Shenir (Deut. 3:9).

nodes.label: Mount Sion
nodes.description: Denotes Mount Hermon in Deut. 4:48; called Sirion by the Sidonians, and by the Amorites Shenir (Deut. 3:9).

verses.text: From Aroer, which is by the bank of the river Arnon, even unto mount Sion, which is Hermon,
